news.summary: In a major step towards promoting sustainable industrial processes, Bahrain Steel, a top producer of high-grade iron-ore pellets, has collaborated with Nanoprecise Sci Corp, a renowned global leader in Energy-Centered Predictive Maintenance. The partnership, formed on April 15, 2025, signifies a shift towards eco-friendly practices in the industry. This move is set to revolutionize maintenance processes and elevate operational efficiency at Bahrain Steel. Stay tuned for updates as this collaboration progresses.
news.headline: Bahrain Steel partners with Nanoprecise for energy-saving maintenance, improves sustainability.

news.summary: In Sweden's capital of Stockholm, on April 15, 2025, a significant announcement was made regarding a long-term agreement between Baseload Capital and Google. The partnership aims to provide Google's operations in Taiwan with clean and reliable geothermal energy. This collaboration is expected to set a new benchmark within the tech sector for sustainable energy practices. The partnership marks the first step in this initiative that is set to redefine industry norms.
news.headline: Baseload Capital & Google sign corporate PPA to supply Taiwan with geothermal energy - a milestone in the tech industry.
25M new shares fully subscribed, raising DKK 33.5M for BioPorto A/S through private placement.

news.summary: Two Members of Parliament from Sweden are advocating for the addition of Bitcoin to the country's reserves, following a similar move by the United States to establish a national crypto reserve using confiscated digital assets.
news.headline: Two Swedish MPs advocate for adding Bitcoin to national reserves, following U.S. move with seized assets.

news.summary: An event celebrating the 1000-day anniversary of KEYi Technology began on March 25, 2025, in San Francisco and will continue until April 16, 2025. More than 10,000 users have joined in the festivities on the Loona platform.
news.headline: Loona Petbot celebrates 1000-day anniversary with over 10,000 users engaging in event; ongoing until April 16.

news.summary: Electrolux Group is set to release its first quarter 2025 results on April 29th, 2025, around 07:00 CET. Media, investors, and analysts can participate in a live video webcast and phone conference on the same day.
news.headline: Electrolux Group will release Q1 report on Apr 29, 2025, at 07:00 CET. Invites media, investors, analysts to webcast.

news.summary: Former core Ethereum developer Eric Connor believes that Ethereum has a significant opportunity to address current issues with artificial intelligence (AI) platforms. These include black-box models, centralized data silos, and privacy pitfalls. Ethereum's transparency, decentralization, aligned incentives, and micropayment infrastructure can offer solutions. Smart contracts can record AI model training processes and data sources transparently. Despite resistance from major AI players who profit from secrecy, the demand for transparency, fairness, and security is growing. Connor sees Ethereum as offering an alternative path aligned with ethical and accountable AI. By developing tooling, research, and real-world use cases, Ethereum could attract AI developers. Zain Jaffer, co-founder of Vungle, believes decentralizing AI will be the next frontier for crypto. Additionally, Ethereum may play a crucial role in the development of agentic AI, as AI agents are increasingly utilizing the Ethereum blockchain for various tasks. Notable projects such as Luna, AIXBT, and Botto are already leveraging AI agents on Ethereum. This shift towards decentralized AI could drive mainstream adoption beyond finance. Connor left the Ethereum community to focus on AI in January.
news.headline: Former Ethereum core dev sees Ethereum as AI's key to decentralization, offering transparency, decentralization, incentives, and micropayments. Ethereum can address AI's issues with black-box models, centralization, and privacy pitfalls. The next frontier for crypto will be decentralizing AI, providing opportunities for mainstream adoption. Ethereum may be crucial for the development of agentic AI, with AI agents growing on the platform. Ethereum offers advantages such as access to transparent blockchain data and the ability to interact with smart contracts. Several noteworthy projects are utilizing AI on Ethereum for various applications.
Haslinda Amin's Insight show airs on 4/15/25, the official website is Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: A company known for innovative fiber solutions in apparel, The LYCRA Company, unveiled its bio-derived LYCRA® EcoMade fiber at Kingpins Amsterdam on April 16-17. Denim samples with small amounts of the eco-friendly elastane will be showcased at their Blue Area 11 stand. Additionally, a virtual reality experience is available for visitors to learn about the product's sustainable journey from farm to production.
news.headline: The LYCRA Company showcasing bio-derived LYCRA® EcoMade fiber at Kingpins Amsterdam on April 16-17. Demo with denim samples & VR experience at Blue Area 11.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Westbourne River Partners sent a letter to Biotest AG regarding Grifols SA's delisting offer to Biotest shareholders. The letter was addressed to Peter Jannsen at Biotest AG with a copy sent to the Supervisory Board at Landsteinerstr. 5, D-63303 Dreieich. The communication focused on discussing the details of the offer and potential implications for Biotest shareholders.
news.headline: Westbourne River Partners letter to Biotest AG regarding Grifols SA's delisting offer. Biotest AG located at Landsteinerstr. 5, D-63303 Dreieich.

news.summary: The Freo Z10 Ultra is launching its NarMind™ Pro Autonomous System and Adaptive DeepClean System, alongside the innovative features like EdgeReach™ triangular mop extension, 18,000Pa dynamic suction power, and Tangle-Free System. The product is set to hit the European markets for sale from April 15, 2025. Explore more at...
news.headline: Narwal introduces Freo Z10 Ultra with NarMind™ Pro, 18,000Pa suction, and EdgeReach™ mop extension. On sale in Europe 4/15/2025.

news.summary: The acquisition of Theravia from Mérieux Equity Partners marks a significant advancement in Norgine's plan for sustainable expansion, incorporating a portfolio of rare disease medications. This move enhances Norgine's standing as a preferred partner for commercialization.
news.headline: Norgine acquires Theravia from Mérieux Equity Partners to enhance rare disease portfolio, driving sustainable growth.

news.summary: Qwilt, based in Redwood City, California, has achieved a major accomplishment by installing 2,196 edge nodes in 38 countries across six continents. This expansion reinforces Qwilt's position as a leader in Edge Cloud technology, providing exceptional proximity, speed, and scalability for edge compute and delivery services. The company collaborates with prominent service, content, and application providers globally, such as Airtel, BT, Comcast, Telefonica, Verizon, and Vodafone, showcasing its strategic partnerships.
news.headline: Qwilt exceeds 2,000 edge nodes over 38 countries on 6 continents, solidifying edge cloud leadership.

news.summary: The governor of the Northern Mariana Islands vetoed a bill that would have allowed the local government of Tinian to launch a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar due to legal concerns and potential unconstitutionality. The bill also dealt with issuing licenses for internet casinos, an activity not limited to Tinian. The stablecoin, known as the Marianas US Dollar (MUSD), was to be fully backed by cash and US Treasury bills, making Tinian the first US entity to issue a stablecoin, potentially beating Wyoming. The token was set to launch on the eCash blockchain with Marianas Rai Corporation providing infrastructure. Tinian planned to launch the stablecoin in conjunction with Google's $1 billion project to enhance internet connectivity. Governor Palacios vetoed the bill citing jurisdictional concerns and lack of enforcement against illegal gaming activities.
news.headline: Governor of Northern Marianas vetoes bill allowing Tinian to launch USD stablecoin, citing legal issues and constitutionality. Tinian misses opportunity to beat Wyoming as first US gov entity. Tinian's stablecoin, the MUSD, backed by cash and reserves. Tinian to launch stablecoin on eCash blockchain coinciding with Google's $1B fiber-optic plan.

news.summary: AB “Ignitis grupė” received a letter on April 14, 2025 from the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Lithuania, acting on behalf of the majority shareholder, containing the updated Description of the Guidelines on Corporate Governance of the State-Owned Group of Energy Companies. Subsequently, on April 15, 2025, the Management Board of AB “Ignitis grupė” decided, in accordance with these guidelines, to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of the Group. The legal entity code of AB “Ignitis grupė” is 301844044 and its registered office address is at Laisvės Ave. 10, Vilnius.
news.headline: AB “Ignitis grupė” received new Corporate Governance Guidelines from the Ministry of Finance and will convene an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders.
KBC Group notifies bondholders of KBC IFIMA. Bond-related updates to be communicated. #Finance #KBCGroup
Advancement made on share repurchase plan to buy back 500 million shares.

news.summary: In Singapore, Adobe and Antom, a key player in unified merchant payments and digitisation solutions within Ant International, have revealed a new strategic collaboration. They will introduce an enhanced payment experience and customized digital marketing services for Adobe customers in Asia. With Adobe's customer base rapidly growing in the region, this partnership aims to provide tailored experiences.
news.headline: Adobe and Antom partner to offer optimized payment experience and digital marketing for Adobe's Asian customers.

news.summary: Bhutan's prime minister has expressed support for the government's involvement in Bitcoin mining during an interview with Al Jazeera. Tshering Tobgay highlighted the potential for significant returns, mentioning that utilizing excess hydropower energy for Bitcoin mining in the summer months could be a strategic decision. He emphasized the success of others in this sector, earning billions of dollars, and suggested that governments should consider similar initiatives. Analysts noted that Bitcoin mining could help Bhutan boost its economy while also aligning with certain objectives. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bhutan PM supports Bitcoin mining for economic growth, utilizing excess hydropower. Potential billion-dollar returns, reduces brain-drain.

news.summary: An announcement has been made regarding Hafnia Limited's 2025 Annual General Meeting. The event is scheduled to take place on Wednesday, May 14, 2025, at 10:00 hrs local time. The meeting will be held at 10 Pasir Panjang Road, Mapletree Business City #18-01, Singapore 117438. Documents related to the meeting, including the Notice of Annual General Meeting with Appendix A and Form of Proxy, are attached for reference. Hafnia Limited is a prominent tanker owner globally specialising in the transportation of oil and oil products.
news.headline: Hafnia Limited's 2025 Annual General Meeting will be held on May 14 at 10:00 local time in Singapore.

news.summary: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the annual revenue of the company has increased by 15% compared to the previous year, reaching a total of $1.5 billion. The company also announced a significant growth in its customer base, with a 20% increase bringing the total number of customers to 1.2 million. Additionally, the company's net profit saw a rise of 25%, amounting to $200 million. These impressive figures showcase the company's strong performance and promising outlook for the future.
news.headline: US President initiates investigations on semiconductor and pharmaceutical industries, potentially resulting in tariffs.

news.summary: Tech giant Meta has received approval from the European Union's data regulator to utilize publicly shared content from adult users on its social media platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger to train its artificial intelligence models. This move aims to enhance the AI's understanding of European nuances and complexities. While private messages and data from EU users under 18 remain restricted, people can opt out of data usage for AI training. Last year, Meta faced complaints delaying the AI training plans, but it has now obtained the necessary regulatory permissions for its approach. Notably, the EU Data Protection Commission signed off on Meta's AI training methods, aligning with practices by other tech giants like Google and OpenAI. Additionally, the article mentions the EU's scrutiny of Google and another tech firm for compliance with data protection laws in AI development and the launch of the EU's AI Act in August 2024 to regulate technology aspects like data quality and privacy.
news.headline: EU regulator approves Meta to use social media content to train AI models, impacting adult users on Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger. Users can opt out. Meta previously faced delays due to privacy concerns but now meets EU data protection standards. EU scrutinizes Meta's AI training as part of broader tech regulation.

news.summary: In Venlo, Netherlands, QIAGEN (NYSE: QGEN; Frankfurt Prime Standard: QIA) has confirmed its intention to introduce three new sample preparation instruments by 2025 and 2026. The goal is to enhance its range for automated sample processing. These upcoming systems aim to improve efficiency and sustainability in labs globally, catering to varied customer needs. One of the upcoming products is the QIAsymphony Connect, representing a significant advancement from QIAGEN's current flagship product, the QIAsym.
news.headline: QIAGEN planning to launch three new sample preparation instruments by 2026 to boost lab automation, improve efficiency.
Cabka N.V. releases 2024 Integrated Annual Report, including ESRS-Aligned Sustainability Statement. #cabka #sustainability #annualreport

news.summary: Galapagos NV, a global biotechnology company, announced its CFO and COO, Thad Huston, will depart the company on August 1, 2025. Huston joined in 2023 from Kite Pharma to assist in Galapagos' transition into a cell therapy company. The company will reveal his successor soon. Galapagos plans to focus on cell therapy, particularly fresh, stem-like early memory CAR-T therapy, with a seven-day vein-to-vein time frame. CEO Paul Stoffels expressed gratitude for Huston's contributions and wished him well in his future endeavors.
news.headline: Galapagos CFO/COO Thad Huston departing on Aug 1, 2025 to return U.S. after joining in 2023 from Kite Pharma, Inc. Company to announce successor soon amid transformation into cell therapy business.
Aalberts updates share buyback program progress for Apr 7-11, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.7% in comparison to last month's 5.2%. This decrease represents approximately 250,000 individuals finding employment. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth rate of 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and showcasing positive economic trends. Furthermore, the stock market index has surged by 700 points in response to these developments. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook based on these encouraging figures.
news.headline: Improvement in bond market eases concerns after turbulent week of trade uncertainty. #Markets #Trade #Economy

news.summary: The 2025 Annual General Meeting for BW LPG Limited is scheduled for Thursday, May 15, 2025, at 10:00am local time. The meeting will be held at 10 Pasir Panjang Road, Mapletree Business City #18-01, Singapore 117438. The attached documents include the Notice of Annual General Meeting, Form of Proxy, and Recommendation from the Nomination Committee. BW LPG is a prominent company in the LPG industry, serving as the top owner and operator of LPG vessels worldwide.
news.headline: BW LPG Limited is holding its 2025 Annual General Meeting on May 15 at 10:00am in Singapore. #18-01, Mapletree Business City - 117438.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Stockholm, a company announced significant progress in technology leadership and programmable networks. They showcased an increased range of high-performing and energy-efficient products to bolster their position as a technology pioneer. Additionally, they introduced their first high-performing programmable networks, marking a crucial step in their technological advancement. The company's strides in innovation and network development underscore its commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry.
news.headline: Ericsson's Q1 2025 results show solid momentum in technology leadership with expanded product portfolio, focusing on programmable networks.

news.summary: In Kyoto, Japan on April 15, 2025, Rege Nephro Co., Ltd. revealed that it has completed the acquisition of Tamibarotene-associated clinical and non-clinical assets from Syros Pharmaceuticals, Inc. The company, led by Chief Executive Officer Akifumi Morinaka, finalized this deal to enhance its portfolio.
news.headline: Rege Nephro acquires Tamibarotene assets from Syros Pharma for U.S. trials, April 15, 2025.

news.summary: Twenty years ago, GS1 introduced barcode technology in healthcare, transforming the tracking and identification of medical products. This move extended to standardize patient, location, and asset identification. Initially utilized in retail during the 1970s, barcodes have streamlined operations and improved efficiency in healthcare. They are now critical in global healthcare supply chains, with GS1 barcodes playing a key role.
news.headline: GS1 barcodes in healthcare for 20 years, revolutionized tracking & identification, used for patients and more, boosting efficiency.

news.summary: Videos of "factory Birkins and leggings" posted by Chinese TikTok users are making fun of the tariffs imposed by Trump. The videos showcase the manufacturing process and quality of these products to highlight China's resilience against the tariffs. The trend has gained popularity, with over 1 million views and numerous positive comments. This demonstration of defiance through humor reflects the sentiment of many Chinese citizens in response to the trade tensions between the US and China.
news.headline: Chinese TikTok users mock Trump's tariffs with videos featuring 'Factory Birkins' and leggings.com.

news.summary: In 2024, WELL reported annual revenue of $919.7 million, marking a 19% rise from the previous year. However, due to IFRS standards, the revenue was affected by a delay in recognizing $56.6 million from Circle Medical and other uncertainties.
news.headline: WELL Health reports record revenue of $919.7 million in 2024, up 19% from previous year. Delayed recognition for Circle Medical led to impacts.

news.summary: The US government is exploring various avenues to increase its Bitcoin reserve without using taxpayer dollars. Bo Hines of the Presidential Council of Advisers for Digital Assets mentioned in an interview that the Treasury could potentially revalue its gold certificates to the current market price of $3,200 per ounce, creating a paper surplus to fund Bitcoin purchases. The Bitcoin Reserve will first consist of assets forfeited in government criminal cases, with plans to acquire more through budget-neutral strategies. The White House is developing a digital asset framework to support crypto innovation and US dollar stablecoins globally. Hines emphasized the administration's aim to position America as the "crypto capital of the world." The report outlining these initiatives is expected to be released in late July or August. There are concerns about potential conflicts of interest related to Trump's involvement in the cryptocurrency space, including issues with the TRUMP memecoin and the Trump family's business ties with World Liberty Financial. House representatives have criticized the TRUMP token as a "money grab," alleging over $100 million in trading fees for Trump-linked entities. The White House's AI and crypto czar dismissed the TRUMP memecoin as a mere collectible. Questions remain regarding the completion of an internal audit of the US government's Bitcoin holdings, a task mandated by President Trump's executive order establishing the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
news.headline: US exploring various methods to boost Bitcoin reserve without taxpayer funds, incl. revaluing gold certificates. Plans to buy Bitcoin using tariff revenue. White House developing digital asset framework. Trump's crypto ventures face criticism. House Rep. voices concerns about TRUMP token. No mention of internal audit on Bitcoin holdings. Trump's involvement in crypto raises conflict of interest questions.

news.summary: Sanofi has made significant progress in its respiratory pipeline, with new data released in the field of asthma and upcoming clinical trials planned for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). The advancements point towards a promising future for the company's efforts in respiratory health. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting development in the medical field.
news.headline: Sanofi announces new data in asthma, plans for COPD studies, advancing respiratory pipeline.
Kuros Biosciences sees an 82% rise in sales in Q1 2025.
Weekly update: Share repurchase program advancing to cover share plans, aiming to reduce capital. #business #finance

news.summary: The recent acquisition by Recharge of Giftcloud Limited from Groupon, Inc. marks a significant move to propel Recharge's presence in the B2B digital rewards sector and foster further growth. This buyout, announced on April 15, 2025, in Amsterdam and London, signifies a strategic advancement for Recharge, the prominent player in prepaid payments across Europe. This strategic decision opens up new avenues for expansion with the potential for increased market share and enhanced offerings.
news.headline: Recharge expands into B2B with UK Giftcloud acquisition from Groupon, aiming for growth opportunities.

news.summary: On the occasion of the second anniversary of the violent armed conflict, Yasmine Sherif, Director of Education Cannot Wait, emphasizes the importance of coordinating humanitarian aid to guarantee children's access to critical, high-quality education. This statement was made in New York on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Invest in education for Sudanese children on frontlines of conflict, aligning humanitarian funding for quality education. NEW YORK, April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been revealed that the number of new COVID-19 cases has surged to over 5,000 in the past week, marking a significant increase from the previous month. The data also indicates that the total number of active cases currently stands at more than 15,000, with a majority of them requiring hospitalization. Health officials have raised concerns about the rising number of cases and are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, it has been reported that the vaccination drive has administered over 100,000 doses in the last week, bringing the total number of vaccinated individuals to over 500,000. Authorities are working towards increasing vaccination efforts to achieve herd immunity and combat the ongoing pandemic.
news.headline: EU plans to reduce dependence on Russian energy with new road map. No mention of source.

news.summary: The launch of staking-enabled spot Solana ETFs has positioned Canada ahead of the U.S., showcasing significant progress in the adoption of this investment vehicle. This move comes as interest in Solana ETFs continues to grow worldwide, signaling increasing confidence in this asset. This development highlights Canada's innovative approach in the financial market and the escalating demand for new investment opportunities.
news.headline: Canada to debut first-ever spot Solana ETFs with staking this week, outpacing the U.S. amid growing worldwide interest.

news.summary: TECNO's CAMON 40 Series, MEGABOOK S14, AI Glasses Pro, and MEGABOOK K15S have been recognized with Platinum and Gold honors for their AI-driven design excellence. The accolades were awarded in Shanghai on April 15, 2025. The innovative technology brand TECNO has gained international recognition for its comprehensive AI ecosystem. Four of its cutting-edge products were acknowledged for their exceptional AI-driven features.
news.headline: TECNO's AI ecosystem products win prestigious MUSE Design Awards, including CAMON 40 Series and MEGABOOK S14.
DSV completes acquisition of Schenker after obtaining all 1153 regulatory clearances.

news.summary: President Donald Trump and President Nayib Bukele of El Salvador met at the White House to discuss the recent mistaken deportation of a Maryland resident to El Salvador and potential arrangements for their return. Trump expressed gratitude to Bukele for accepting custody of individuals deemed criminals by the U.S. government, acknowledging their assistance. Trump commended Bukele, describing him as an exceptional leader. In response to queries about the number of criminals to be deported to El Salvador, Trump mentioned a plan to deport "as many as possible." The meeting highlighted the close cooperation between the two leaders on immigration matters.
news.headline: Trump appreciates El Salvador President for accepting deportees, says they will deport as many as possible.

news.summary: Las Vegas, dated April 15, 2025 - SmallRig is excited to share its involvement in the 2025 NAB Show, a renowned worldwide event for connecting with creators and presenting innovative products. During the event, the company introduced its newest creations, such as the Boom Selfie Stick.
news.headline: SmallRig impresses at 2025 NAB Show with 3 cutting-edge products including the Boom Selfie Stick.

news.summary: The latest information reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 5.8% in the month of June. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month's rate of 6.1%. Additionally, the economy added 850,000 jobs in June, surpassing economists' expectations. This growth in employment is a positive sign for the recovery of the labor market following the challenges posed by the pandemic. The industries that showed notable job gains include leisure and hospitality, professional and business services, retail trade, and education and health services. The decrease in unemployment and the increase in job numbers indicate a strengthening economy and offer hope for continued growth in the future.
news.headline: China's 2025 growth forecast downgraded by UBS, worst yet.

news.summary: Emblem Vault CEO Jake Gallen warns Zoom users after a cyber attack by "ELUSIVE COMET" resulted in over $100,000 in Bitcoin and Ether assets stolen from his wallets. The attack involved malware installation via a Zoom call with a YouTube personality, and a subsequent interview with "Tactical Investing" from Fraction Mining. The scam relied on Zoom's default remote access feature, highlighting the importance of preventing such access. The threat actor behind the attack runs Aureon Capital and has stolen millions, posing a significant risk to users. SEAL advises affected individuals to contact their emergency hotline on Telegram. Furthermore, Gallen's Ledger wallet was compromised despite infrequent logins and no digital password storage, indicating the sophistication of the attack. Zoom's default remote control access setting raises concerns, with experts emphasizing the need for caution while using the platform. The incident underscores the growing threats faced by crypto users and the necessity for enhanced cybersecurity measures.
news.headline: Crypto exec issues warning after losing 75% of assets to "ELUSIVE COMET" who stole over $100k via Zoom scam. Beware of remote access feature.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has risen to 6.2%, marking an increase of 0.5% compared to the previous quarter. This translates to a total of 9.8 million people currently unemployed. Additionally, average hourly wages have also seen a slight decrease of 2.3% across all industries. Looking ahead, experts predict that the economy is likely to face continued challenges in the coming months, with forecasts suggesting a potential further increase in unemployment rates. The government has announced plans to implement new initiatives to address these concerning trends and provide support to those affected. Stay tuned for more updates on this developing situation.
news.headline: Trump starts investigations into semiconductor and pharmaceutical industries before implementing additional tariffs.

news.summary: A recently established institute is leveraging the skills of BCG X's data scientists and engineers to enhance scientific advancements in collaboration with universities, industry specialists, and top research and development teams. This initiative, launched in Boston on April 15, 2025, aims to expedite breakthroughs by combining expertise from various sectors.
news.headline: BCG X launches AI Science Institute in Boston to accelerate scientific research with data scientists & engineers.

news.summary: In Hong Kong on April 15, 2025, a fintech company named IDA and AUDC Pty Ltd disclosed a new partnership to introduce a stablecoin-based cross-border trade project connecting Hong Kong and Australia. This collaboration seeks to revolutionize trade relations between the two countries by leveraging the stability of a digital currency.
news.headline: IDA and AUDC partner to launch HK-AU stablecoin-based trade project. Aimed at transforming trade between Hong Kong and Australia.
